overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a robed character exploring gothic stone corridors with stained glass ceilings and entering a furnished dormitory room. The environment features detailed medieval architecture, warm lantern lighting, and ornate wooden furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic stone corridor with stained glass ceiling transitioning to side hallway

events.description: turning right from main corridor with stained glass ceiling into narrower stone side corridor
slowing to stop at the large wooden door to interact with it

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the gothic corridor, turning right into a side hallway and approaching the carved wooden door at the end

entered.detail: arched stained glass ceiling with greenish-blue panes allowing diffused natural light
gothic pointed stone arches forming the corridor structure
lit wall-mounted lanterns with warm yellow glow
ornate black wrought iron railings along the corridor edges
large carved dark wooden door with decorative glass panels

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a gothic stone corridor illuminated by a greenish stained glass ceiling and warm wall sconces. The camera follows from behind as the character turns right into a narrower side passage, approaching a large carved wooden door at the hallway's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory chamber with multiple four-poster beds

events.description: opening the wooden door and entering the dormitory room
turning to survey the room and examine the furnishings and beds

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory and walking through the chamber to observe the four-poster beds, bookshelves, and decorative elements

entered.detail: wooden four-poster beds with dark green draped curtains and white bedding
tall wooden bookshelf filled with leather-bound books
circular patterned rug with intricate designs on the stone floor
ornate wooden storage chest with metal banding and fittings
decorative woven wall hanging between stone arches
wooden writing desk with chair and lamp

segments.scene_description: The character opens the wooden door and enters a spacious gothic dormitory with high vaulted ceilings. The room contains multiple four-poster beds with green curtains, wooden bookshelves, and ornate furnishings. The camera pans around to survey the chamber's detailed interior as the character explores the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic stone corridor returning to main hallway

events.description: exiting the dormitory room back into the stone corridor
returning to the main corridor with the stained glass ceiling visible ahead

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the entrance, opening the wooden door, and walking back through the stone corridor toward the main hallway

entered.detail: arched stained glass ceiling coming back into view at the corridor intersection
ornate black wrought iron railings along the corridor sides

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory through the wooden door and walks back through the stone side corridor. As the character approaches the main hallway, the greenish stained glass ceiling and ornate metal railings come back into view, completing the return journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody gothic corridor into a lavish dormitory before retracing its steps back to the main hallway. It begins by following a robed character through a stone passage illuminated by a greenish stained glass ceiling and warm wall sconces, moving right into a narrower side hallway toward a carved wooden door. As the door opens, the scene expands into a spacious dormitory featuring high vaulted ceilings, four-poster beds with green curtains, and ornate wooden bookshelves. The camera then pans to survey the detailed interior of the chamber before the character turns back and exits through the same wooden door. Finally, the view shifts back into the stone corridor, returning to the main hallway where the greenish light and ornate metal railings reappear.
